## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`type/issue#-short-title`)
- [ ] Commits follow conventional style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] No secrets, datasets, DB files, or model artifacts committed
- [ ] Consistent with `docs/00_MVP/MVP_SCOPE.md`
- [ ] Build/tests pass locally
